name: Corn Dogs
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat the frankfurters dry and set aside.
2. In a bowl, whisk together the cornmeal, flour, salt, and baking powder.
3. In a small bowl, whisk together the milk and egg until combined.
4. Add the milk mixture to the dry ingredients, whisking until smooth.
5. Heat oil in a deep pot to 375 degrees F (190°C).
6. Dip each frankfurter into the batter, coating it completely.
7. Fry the frankfurters for about 2 to 3 minutes, or until browned.
8. Two to three frankfurters can be fried at a time.
9. Remove from oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
10. Allow the oil to return to the appropriate temperature before frying the remaining frankfurters.
Yield: 6 corn dogs
